modmenu.descriptionTranslation.copycoord: CopyCoords is a client-side Fabric mod that maketh coordinates swifter to copy, transmute, and share.
option.copycoords.copyToClipboard@Toolti: Whether /copycoords doth convey thy coordinates unto the system clipboard anon after sending the chat message.
option.copycoords.copyConvertedToClipboa: Whether /convertcoords doth convey thy transmuted coordinates unto the system clipboard.
option.copycoords.showDimensionInCoordin: If enabled, the realm (Overworld, Nether, End) shall be shown when copying coordinates.
option.copycoords.coordinateFormat@Toolt: Choose how coordinates are displayed: Space (100 64 200), Bracket ([100, 64, 200]), or XYZ (X:100 Y:64 Z:200).
option.copycoords.coordinateTemplate@Too: Enter a custom coordinate manner. Placeholders: {x}, {y}, {z}, {dimension}, {dimName}. Leave empty to use the selected manner above. A preview is shown whilst editing.
option.copycoords.pasteToChatInput@Toolt: If enabled, copied coordinates shall be placed into the chat input box rather than sent or copied.
option.copycoords.instantChatEnabled@Too: If enabled, /cc and /copycoords shall also send their coordinate output to server chat.
option.copycoords.showInstantChatSendUnb: If enabled, showeth a one-time chat hint when Instant Chat Send key is unbound.
option.copycoords.chatCoordinateDetectio: If enabled, CopyCoords doth scan incoming chat messages for coordinate triples and showeth a follow-up action line.
Maximum detected coordinate sets per message
Limits how many detected coordinate action lines CopyCoords will show for a single incoming message.
message.copycoords.command.no_player: Cannot read thy position - no player is present.
message.copycoords.command.copy_failed: Alas, failed to copy coordinates unto clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied_conver: Verily, transmuted coordinates copied unto clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied_with_d: Verily, coordinates with realm copied unto clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.failed: Alas, failed to copy coordinates unto clipboard: %s
message.copycoords.instant_chat_send_unb: [CopyCoords] Instant Chat Send is unbound. Pray bind a key in Controls to employ it.
message.copycoords.command.unknown_goal: Unknown destination realm: %s (use overworld or nether)
message.copycoords.command.unsupported_d: Cannot convert coordinates in this realm (only Overworld and Nether are supported).
